title: Pebble's Chest Shop
description: Player chest shop for Fabric with Flan and Impactor support.
body:
# Pebble's Chest Shop

Make sure you have Fabric Language Kotlin installed! This mod also requires **Architectury** Config is generated in `config/pebbles-chestshop/config.json`, make sure to configure on the first run and restart! Supports **Impactor Economy** or Pebble's Economy. Offers Flan support in terms of chest ownership and placement. ## Permissions - pebbles.chestshop.override: Override chest permission, allows you to destroy or open someone else's shop (OP can do this by default) - pebbles.chestshop.reload: To reload shops and config from JSON using `/chestshop reload` ## Notes - You can create a chest shop by right clicking a chest with paper or configured item. - The shop type is from a customer's perspective! (BUY means your customers can buy from your shop, SELL means your customers can sell their items to your shop) - In sell shop type, you must allocate a budget that so as to not drain your entire econ, you must already - have the amount to deposit when creating the sell shop. - Destroying the sign or chest will remove the shop, any sell budget will be added to your claimable balance in `/chestshop` - You can use `/chestshop` to check all your shop locations, claim your sales and and see remaining budget - You must have flan open container permission in the area to create a shop ## Acknowledgement This mod was funded by Chriscendo of Cobblemon Delta
